summary: Read-only audit found that finish_task auto-growth and auto-compound currently route completed task traces into accepted memory; review-first queues and read-only completion gating are the needed corrections.
next_steps: Add a completion mode that records traces without memory growth for read-only and review work.
Route task memories and behavior rules into candidates plus promotion review records before accepted retrieval.
Add lifecycle holds for auto-generated accepted records lacking explicit review evidence.
Filter retrieval so unreviewed auto-generated accepted records cannot dominate Context Packs.
search_queries: finish_task knowledge growth behavior rules lifecycle review queue auto-promotion guardrails
